description: Convert the existing simple model rocket into a dual-deploy recovery system. The rocket currently has a single parachute deployed at apogee. Add a second parachute to act as a drogue deploying at apogee, and reconfigure the main parachute (minimum 600mm diameter) to deploy at an altitude of 300 meters or lower. The drogue must be smaller than the main parachute. Verify the recovery system with a flight simulation ensuring a ground hit velocity of 15 m/s or less. Save the modified design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork and write a conversion report detailing the parachute sizes and deployment altitudes to /home/ga/Documents/exports/dual_deploy_conversion_report.txt.
